title: Aleuritia nivalis
taxonomy: Aleuritia nivalis belongs to the genus Aleuritia and is classified within the family Orchidaceae. It is a genus of orchids, specifically epiphytic orchids, native to South America. Aleuritia nivalis is a type of orchid that is known for its unique and delicate appearance. The classification of Aleuritia nivalis is further supported by its distinct morphological characteristics, such as its white and green-colored flowers. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Aleuritia nivalis is closely related to other orchid species.
